caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, a white collared shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders is speaking into a professional microphone in a room that looks like a clothing store. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items. A black microphone on a boom arm is visible in the foreground. On-screen text in the bottom left corner features a logo that reads "PODCAST STUDIO" and "PODCAST," while red text on the right says "BOSS TALK JOY" and "LOYALTY IS EVERYTHING." Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze moving slightly, while the background and equipment remain static.
